title: FAA 操守 / FAA conduct
point: 披露重要信息、不得虚假误导、推荐有合理基础。 / Disclose material info; no false/misleading statements; reasonable basis.
keyfacts: 费用/风险/冲突要披露 / Disclose fees/risks/conflicts
sourceRef: Financial Advisers Act — Conduct of Business, Powers & Offences

title: MAS 权力与罪行 / MAS powers & offences
point: MAS 可检查/调查 + 执法(指令/限制/撤牌/禁业);无牌或虚假陈述属罪行。 / MAS may inspect/investigate + enforce; unlicensed or false statements are offences.
keyfacts: 撤牌、禁业、罚款 / Suspension/revocation, prohibition, fines
sourceRef: Financial Advisers Act — Conduct of Business, Powers & Offences
